else M=A and 5644448-(-748666)or 15065783-(-171724)end end end end end end end M=#q return W(A)end,function(r,n)local W=K(n)local G=function(...)return M(r,{...},n,W)end return G end,function(r,n)local W=K(n)local G=function(G)return M(r,{G},n,W)end return G end,function(r)for n=475552+-475551,#r,33981+-33980 do X[r[n]]=X[r[n]]+(-795363+795364)end if G then local
